SEARCH
Package model

Class DBImplementationAdministrator

java.lang.Object
model.DBImplementationAdministrator
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdministratorDAO
public class DBImplementationAdministrator extends Object implements AdministratorDAO
Concrete implementation of AdministratorDAO connecting to a database. Handles all Administrator-related persistence operations.
Author:
Iker

  • Constructor Details

    • DBImplementationAdministrator

      public DBImplementationAdministrator()
      Initializes the DAO and reads database connection settings from the configuration file.

  • Method Details

    • openConnection

      private void openConnection()

    • checkUser

      public boolean checkUser(Administrator administrator)
      This method checks if the provided administrator's credentials (name and password) exist in the database. It opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to check for the administrator's credentials, and executes the query. If a matching record is found, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      checkUser in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      administrator -
      Returns:
      true if the administrator's credentials are valid, false otherwise

    • checkAdminExists

      public boolean checkAdminExists(String adminName)
      This method checks if an administrator with the given name already exists in the database. It opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to check for the administrator's name, and executes the query. If a matching record is found, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      checkAdminExists in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      adminName -
      Returns:
      true if an administrator with the given name exists, false otherwise

    • insertUser

      public boolean insertUser(Administrator user)
      This method inserts a new administrator into the database. It first checks if an administrator with the same name already exists by calling the checkAdminExists method. If an administrator with the same name exists, it returns false. Otherwise, it opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to insert the new administrator's name and password, and executes the update. If the insertion is successful, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      insertUser in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      user -
      Returns:
      true if the administrator was successfully inserted, false otherwise

    • getAllAdministrators

      public List<Administrator> getAllAdministrators()
      This method retrieves a list of all administrators from the database. It opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to select all records from the administrator table, and executes the query. It iterates through the result set and creates Administrator objects for each record, adding them to a list. Finally, it returns the list of administrators. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      getAllAdministrators in interface AdministratorDAO
      Returns:
      a list of all administrators in the database

    • getAdministratorByName

      public Administrator getAdministratorByName(String name)
      This method retrieves an administrator from the database based on the provided name. It opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to select the record with the specified name, and executes the query. If a matching record is found, it creates an Administrator object with the retrieved name and password and returns it. If no matching record is found, it returns null. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      getAdministratorByName in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the administrator to retrieve
      Returns:
      an Administrator object if a matching record is found, null otherwise

    • updateAdministrator

      public boolean updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
      This method updates an administrator's password in the database. It takes an Administrator object as a parameter, retrieves the administrator's name and new password, and opens a connection to the database. It prepares a SQL statement to update the password for the specified administrator name and executes the update. If the update is successful, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      updateAdministrator in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      admin -
      Returns:
      true if the administrator was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • updatePassword

      public boolean updatePassword(String adminName, String newPassword)
      This method updates an administrator's password in the database based on the administrator's name. It takes the administrator's name and the new password as parameters, opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to update the password for the specified administrator name, and executes the update. If the update is successful, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      updatePassword in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      adminName -
      newPassword -
      Returns:
      true if the password was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • deleteAdministrator

      public boolean deleteAdministrator(String name)
      This method deletes an administrator from the database based on the administrator's name. It takes the administrator's name as a parameter, opens a connection to the database, prepares a SQL statement to delete the record with the specified administrator name, and executes the update. If the deletion is successful, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false. It also handles any SQL exceptions that may occur during the process and ensures that all resources are properly closed after use.
      Specified by:
      deleteAdministrator in interface AdministratorDAO
      Parameters:
      name -
      Returns:
      true if the administrator was successfully deleted, false otherwise
